title: Regulatory Changes in Electronic Invoicing
evidence: New legislation mandating electronic invoicing reflects a desire on the part of governments to bolster tax compliance and streamline financial reporting.

title: Supply Chain Disruption Risks for Global Scale Expansion
evidence: Businesses turning increasingly towards data federation to counter disruption from geopolitical conflict or labor unrest.

title: Compliance with Digital Sovereignty and Data Protection Laws
evidence: SAP Cloud Infrastructure self-assessment confirms compliance with BSI’s C3A catalog for high regulatory requirements jurisdictions.
